title: Ability to expand the left workspace panel
excerpt:
The left panel/window is too narrow and does not allow you to expand it to read the entire workspace names. 
Pleeeeeease figure out how to make this dynamic and able to expand.  I saw you put a little snowman animation i…

posts.author: DannyB (Danny B)
posts.cookedHtml:
The left panel/window is too narrow and does not allow you to expand it to read the entire workspace names.
Pleeeeeease figure out how to make this dynamic and able to expand. I saw you put a little snowman animation in there - you can totally make this panel expandable!

Thank you -
